title: Hastewalk Enchantment
description: Ever dreamed of an enchantment that let you walk faster ? Install this mod to make your wish come true
body:
**This mod introduces new enchantment books:**
**Hastewalk I** → Grants the speed of **Speed (I)**
**Hastewalk II** → Grants the speed of **Speed II**
**Hastewalk III** → Grants the speed of **Speed III**

**How to Obtain:**
These enchantments can be found in enchanting tables (or chests) and are exclusively compatible with foot armor (boots)

**Known Bug:**
The Hastewalk enchantment can currently be applied to other armor pieces, but it will not work unless placed on foot armor
